title: Spicy Ukrainian Chicken Salad
description: A fresh, light, romantic Ukrainian dish featuring ground coriander, bhuna, and Mediterranean-friendly flavors.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, ground coriander, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, and bhuna masala.
Add the olive oil to the skillet and sear the chicken for 6-7 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through (internal temperature 75°C / 165°F).
Remove the chicken from the skillet, let it rest for 5 minutes, then slice or shred into bite‑sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the diced cucumber, bell pepper, chopped dill, and mint.
Add the sliced chicken and drizzle with lemon juice; gently toss to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt, pepper, or lemon juice if needed.
Serve the salad chilled or at room temperature for a refreshing, romantic meal.
